totemresize.title: Totem Resizer
totemresize.subcategory.held.desc: Controls the size of the Totem of Undying when held in your Main Hand or Off-Hand (first-person view).
totemresize.option.held_scale.tooltip:
Select a size for the held totem.

  1  = Invisible (0.0×) – GPU draws nothing
  2  = Minimalist (0.1×)
  3  = Small (0.4×)
  4  = Slightly Small (0.7×)
  5  = Vanilla (1.0×) – Default
  6  = Slightly Large (1.5×)
  7  = Large (2.0×)
  8  = Extra Large (3.0×)
  9  = Huge (4.0×)
  10 = Screen Overload (6.0×)

Changes apply instantly when you click Save & Exit.
totemresize.option.held_scale.detail: Tip: Set to 1 (Invisible) to completely hide the totem from your hand. Set to 5 for the default Minecraft experience.
totemresize.subcategory.pop.desc: Controls the size of the full-screen overlay animation that plays when a Totem of Undying saves you from death.
totemresize.option.pop_scale.tooltip:
Select a size for the totem pop overlay.

  1  = Invisible (0.0×) – completely removed
  2  = Minimalist (0.1×)
  3  = Small (0.4×)
  4  = Slightly Small (0.7×)
  5  = Vanilla (1.0×) – Default
  6  = Slightly Large (1.5×)
  7  = Large (2.0×)
  8  = Extra Large (3.0×)
  9  = Huge (4.0×)
  10 = Screen Overload (6.0×)

Changes apply instantly when you click Save & Exit.
totemresize.option.pop_scale.detail: Tip: Set to 1 (Invisible) to fully disable the pop animation. This is the only 100% effective way to remove it. Priority 999999 ensures no resource pack can override this.
